StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT SCHEMA_NAME(udf.schema_id) AS [Schema], udf.name AS [Name], udf.object_id AS [ID], (case when 'FN' = udf.type then 1 when 'FS' = udf.type then 1 when 'IF' = udf.type then 3 when 'TF' = udf.type then 2 when 'FT' = udf.type then 2 else 0 end) AS [FunctionType], CASE WHEN udf.type IN ('FN','IF','TF') THEN 1 WHEN udf.type IN ('FS','FT') THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS [ImplementationType], CAST( case when udf.is_ms_shipped = 1 then 1 when ( select major_id from sys.extended_properties where major_id = udf.object_id and minor_id = 0 and class = 1 and name = N'microsoft_database_tools_support') is not null then 1 else 0 end AS bit) AS [IsSystemObject], CAST(CASE WHEN ISNULL(smudf.definition, ssmudf.definition) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bit) AS [IsEncrypted], CAST(ISNULL(OBJECTPROPERTYEX(udf.object_id, N'IsSchemaBound'),0) AS bit) AS [IsSchemaBound], usrt.name AS [DataType], ISNULL(baset.name, N'') AS [SystemType], CAST(CASE WHEN baset.name IN (N'nchar', N'nvarchar') AND ret_param.max_length <> -1 THEN ret_param.max_length/2 ELSE ret_param.max_length END AS int) AS [Length], CAST(ret_param.precision AS int) AS [NumericPrecision], CAST(ret_param.scale AS int) AS [NumericScale], ISNULL(xscret_param.name, N'') AS [XmlSchemaNamespace], ISNULL(s2ret_param.name, N'') AS [XmlSchemaNamespaceSchema], ISNULL( (case ret_param.is_xml_document when 1 then 2 else 1 end), 0) AS [XmlDocumentConstraint], s1ret_param.name AS [DataTypeSchema] FROM sys.all_objects AS udf LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.sql_modules AS smudf ON smudf.object_id = udf.object_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.system_sql_modules AS ssmudf ON ssmudf.object_id = udf.object_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.all_parameters AS ret_param ON ret_param.object_id = udf.object_id and ret_param.is_output = @_msparam_0 LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.types AS usrt ON usrt.user_type_id = ret_param.user_type_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.types AS baset ON (baset.user_type_id = ret_param.system_type_id and baset.user_type_id = baset.system_type_id) or ((baset.system_type_id = ret_param.system_type_id) and (baset.user_type_id = ret_param.user_type_id) and (baset.is_user_defined = 0) and (baset.is_assembly_type = 1)) LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.xml_schema_collections AS xscret_param ON xscret_param.xml_collection_id = ret_param.xml_collection_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.schemas AS s2ret_param ON s2ret_param.schema_id = xscret_param.schema_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.schemas AS s1ret_param ON s1ret_param.schema_id = usrt.schema_id WHERE (udf.type in ('TF', 'FN', 'IF', 'FS', 'FT')) ORDER BY [Schema] ASC,[Name] ASC

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [Expr1147]=(1) THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysxprops].[id] as [p].[id] IS NOT NULL THEN (1) ELSE (0) END END,0)
CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN isnull([Expr1009],[Expr1026]) IS NULL THEN (1) ELSE (0) END,0)

CASE WHEN ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[name] as [t].[name]=N'nvarchar' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[name] as [t].[name]=N'nchar') AND [Union1085]<>(-1) THEN CONVERT_IMPLICIT(int,[Union1085],0)/(2) ELSE CONVERT_IMPLICIT(int,[Union1085],0) END

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[id] as [t].[id]=[Union1083] AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[id] as [t].[id]=[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[xtype] as [t].[xtype] OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[xtype] as [t].[xtype]=[Union1083] AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[id] as [t].[id]=[Union1084] AND [Expr1148]=(0) AND [Expr1149]=(1)

[mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[number]=(1) AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(4096))=(4096) AND CONVERT(bit,[mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(512),0)=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(bit,[@_msparam_0],0) AND (serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>12 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>8 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>5 OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=12 OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=5 AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(134217728))<>(0) OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=8 AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(-2147483648))<>(0))

CASE WHEN 'FN'=CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0) THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN 'FS'=CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0) THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN 'IF'=CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0) THEN (3) ELSE CASE WHEN 'TF'=CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0) THEN (2) ELSE CASE WHEN 'FT'=CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0) THEN (2) ELSE (0) END END END END END

CASE WHEN 'TF'=CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0) OR 'IF'=CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0) OR 'FN'=CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0) THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN 'FT'=CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0) OR 'FS'=CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0) THEN (2) ELSE (1) END END

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[nsclass] as [o].[nsclass]<>(20) AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[nsclass] as [o].[nsclass]<>(21) AND (CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='FT' OR CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='FS' OR CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='IF' OR CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='FN' OR CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='TF')

has_access('TR',[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[id] as [o].[id],[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[pid] as [o].[pid],[Expr1151])=(1) AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='TR' OR has_access('CO',[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[id] as [o].[id])=(1) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='FN' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='IF' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='IS' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='P' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='RF' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='TF' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='V') OR ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='D' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='R') AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[pid] as [o].[pid]=(0)

(CASE WHEN serverproperty('EngineEdition') IS NOT NULL THEN serverproperty('EngineEdition') ELSE 0 END<>11 OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[name] as [o].[name]<>N'external_models') AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='FN' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='IF' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='IS' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='P' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='RF' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='TF' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='V')
CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[id] as [t].[id]>(256) THEN (1) ELSE (0) END,0)
CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[xtype] as [t].[xtype]=(240) THEN (1) ELSE (0) END,0)

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[id] as [t].[id]=[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[xtype] as [t].[xtype] OR CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[id] as [t].[id]>(256) THEN (1) ELSE (0) END,0)=(0) AND CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[xtype] as [t].[xtype]=(240) THEN (1) ELSE (0) END,0)=(1)
